name: writing
description: Academic writing toolkit (Chinese-first): native Chinese drafting via DeepSeek (consult-zh), AI-trace scrubbing (de-AI-writing, humanizer-zh), CJK LaTeX/xeCJK build + visual audit (latex-cjk-pdf, pdf-audit), bibliography authenticity check (bib-verify), and a locked polish pipeline (zh-prose-polish). Ships a PKU paper LaTeX template.
